subject: A bald, bare-chested muscular performer holds a glowing horned theatrical mask aloft, mid-laugh, in a red-lit arena
description: A bald, muscular bare-chested man holds a glowing horned theatrical mask aloft in his right hand. He's mid-laugh or shout. The whole scene is lit in deep theatrical reds; behind him a tall stone archway rises, suggesting a coliseum or stage. Mood is showman, performance, crowd-pleasing combat. Flavor text spells the vibe out: 'It's not enough to surprise your opponent. You have to delight the crowd as well.'
foreground: Bald muscular performer holding a glowing horned theatrical mask, mid-laugh
background: Red-lit stone archway suggesting a coliseum or stage
